page_metadata.biotools__summary: Program that does targeted characterisation of short structural variation. It can be used for STR analysis, or any other type of targeted analysis. It characterises any variation between a set of user-defined markers.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Program that does targeted characterisation of short structural variation. It can be used for STR analysis, or any other type of targeted analysis. It characterises any variation between a set of user-defined markers.
